text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Early one morning, El Condor Pasa comes running
up to me as I'm making my way to the academy.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Sí! I got up with the sun today!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I'm ridin' high and shiny just like the sun!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Watch out, Trainer, or you might get burned!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: The flames of passion are burnin' outta control!
